list.name: pair
list.label: Pair
list.definition: SELECT id as __value, canonical as __text FROM pairs WHERE is_enabled = true ORDER BY canonical

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(realized_pnl_usd), 0) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}')

SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}')

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE realized_pnl_usd > 0) / COUNT(*)::numeric, 1) ELSE 0 END as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL

SELECT COALESCE(AVG(realized_pnl_usd), 0) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(input_amount_human * quoted_price), 0) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}')

SELECT COALESCE(AVG(realized_slippage_bps), 0) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_slippage_bps IS NOT NULL

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(gas_cost_usd), 0) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}')

SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN realized_pnl_usd < 0 THEN ABS(realized_pnl_usd) ELSE 0 END), 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN realized_pnl_usd > 0 THEN realized_pnl_usd ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN realized_pnl_usd < 0 THEN ABS(realized_pnl_usd) ELSE 0 END), 2) ELSE 999 END as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND direction = 'buy_dex'

SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND direction = 'sell_dex'

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(realized_pnl_usd), 0) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}')

SELECT COALESCE(MIN(realized_pnl_usd), 0) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}')

SELECT COALESCE(STDDEV(realized_pnl_usd), 0) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL

SELECT COALESCE(AVG(input_amount_human * quoted_price), 0) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}')

panels.title: Avg Detect→Exec
panels.description: Avg time from opportunity detection to execution (ms)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.created_at - o.detected_at)) * 1000), 0) as value FROM executions e JOIN opportunities o ON o.id = e.opportunity_id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}')

WITH gaps AS (SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (created_at - LAG(created_at) OVER (ORDER BY created_at))) as gap FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}')) SELECT COALESCE(AVG(gap), 0) as value FROM gaps WHERE gap IS NOT NULL AND gap < 86400

panels.title: Execution Log
panels.description: Detailed execution data with all metrics

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.id, e.created_at as "Time", p.canonical as "Pair", e.strategy as "Strategy", e.direction as "Direction", ROUND(o.spread_bps::numeric, 2) as "Spread (bps)", ROUND(o.anchor_mid::numeric, 2) as "CEX Price", ROUND(o.dex_mid::numeric, 2) as "DEX Price", ROUND(e.input_amount_human::numeric, 6) as "Input Amt", ROUND((e.input_amount_human * e.quoted_price)::numeric, 2) as "Trade Size ($)", ROUND(e.quoted_price::numeric, 2) as "Quote Price", ROUND(e.realized_price::numeric, 2) as "Realized Price", ROUND(e.realized_slippage_bps::numeric, 2) as "Slippage (bps)", ROUND(e.gas_cost_usd::numeric, 4) as "Gas ($)", ROUND(e.realized_pnl_usd::numeric, 4) as "P&L ($)", ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.created_at - o.detected_at)) * 1000) as "Latency (ms)", e.status as "Status" FROM executions e JOIN pairs p ON p.id = e.pair_id LEFT JOIN opportunities o ON o.id = e.opportunity_id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') ORDER BY e.created_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT created_at as time, SUM(realized_pnl_usd) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) as "Cumulative P&L" FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time

SELECT created_at as time, realized_pnl_usd as "P&L" FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time

SELECT e.created_at as time, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.created_at - o.detected_at)) * 1000 as "Latency (ms)" FROM executions e JOIN opportunities o ON o.id = e.opportunity_id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') ORDER BY time

SELECT created_at as time, realized_slippage_bps as "Slippage (bps)" FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_slippage_bps IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time

SELECT realized_pnl_usd FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL

SELECT realized_slippage_bps FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_slippage_bps IS NOT NULL

SELECT o.spread_bps FROM executions e JOIN opportunities o ON o.id = e.opportunity_id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND o.spread_bps IS NOT NULL

SELECT direction as metric, SUM(realized_pnl_usd) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL GROUP BY direction

SELECT direction as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') GROUP BY direction

SELECT strategy as metric, SUM(realized_pnl_usd) as value FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL GROUP BY strategy

SELECT p.canonical as pair, SUM(e.realized_pnl_usd) as pnl FROM executions e JOIN pairs p ON p.id = e.pair_id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND e.realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.canonical ORDER BY pnl DESC

SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at)::int as hour, COUNT(*) as trades FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at)::int as hour, SUM(realized_pnl_usd) as pnl FROM executions WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour
